description: Part of a legal document, dated the month of Shevaṭ 47[..] AM = 940–1039 CE. Witnessed by Menashshe b. Avraham b. Aharon nin Shuʿayb ha-Levi, Manṣūr b. Shelomo b. Azhar, Elʿazar b. Yefet, Shemuʾel b. Yiṣḥaq, Ṣedaqa b. Naḥman, Avraham b. [...], and Muḥsin b. Ḥusayn. (Information in part from CUDL.) Nearly the full document is preserved, but it is very faded; needs examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
